title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Theo plays a gentle peek-a-boo game as he gets ready for bed, finding his favorite sleepy friends hiding around his bedroom before settling down for the night.

pages.text: Time for bed, little Theo! But where are all his sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands in a cozy bedroom wearing blue pajamas, looking around curiously. A stuffed bunny's ear peeks out from behind a pillow on the bed, and a teddy bear's paw is visible under a blanket.
illustration.alt: Theo in pajamas looking for hidden toys in his bedroom

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! There's Bunny behind the pillow! Bunny says, 'Time to sleep!'

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifts a fluffy white pillow to reveal a soft brown bunny underneath. The bunny appears to be yawning sleepily. Stars twinkle on the bedroom wallpaper behind them.
illustration.alt: Theo finding his bunny toy behind a pillow

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! There's Teddy under the blanket! Teddy says, 'Goodnight!'

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pulls back a soft blue blanket to discover a golden teddy bear hiding underneath. The teddy bear has sleepy half-closed eyes and appears ready for bedtime.
illustration.alt: Theo discovering his teddy bear under a blanket

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! The moon is behind the curtain! Moon says, 'Sweet dreams!'

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pushes aside a purple curtain to reveal a smiling crescent moon glowing softly in the dark night sky. Gentle moonbeams stream through the window into his room.
illustration.alt: Theo looking at the moon through his bedroom window

pages.text: Now Theo hides under his cozy covers. Peek-a-boo! Time to sleep! Goodnight, Theo!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes snuggles under soft blankets in his bed, with just his sleepy face peeking out. His bunny and teddy bear are tucked in beside him, and the moon shines peacefully through the window.
illustration.alt: Theo tucked in bed with his toys, ready for sleep

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: Bunny was hiding behind the pillow on Theo's bed!

questions.question: What did Teddy say?
questions.explanation: Teddy said 'Goodnight!' because it was bedtime.

questions.question: Where was the moon hiding?
questions.explanation: The moon was behind the curtain at Theo's window!
